headline: Italy SDI v1.9.1 released with 15 May effective date — accountants on a 3-week clock.
why_it_moved: Score moved because: 2 regulatory deadlines within 90 days

regulatory.title: Italian tax authority releases SDI specs v1.9.1 (eff. 15 May 2026)
regulatory.summary: Key updates for VAT groups and sports workers; effective 15 May 2026 — about 3 weeks of lead time.

regulatory.title: South Africa enacts legal framework for e-invoicing (Tax Admin Laws Amendment Act)
regulatory.summary: Law published 22 April 2026; legal framework for e-invoicing and e-reporting under VAT Act.
